module.description: Module path; auto-detected from go.mod when omitted.

components.description: Named layers, each mapped to package-directory glob patterns (relative to the module root).

groups.description: Named sets of components, usable in any allow/deny list.

policy.description: Fallback stance for components with no allow/deny rule. Optional; defaults to deny (whitelist).

rules.description: Per-component rules. An allow list makes the component a whitelist; a deny-only rule a blacklist. deny always wins.

test_files.description: How _test.go-only imports are judged. Default: hybrid.

skip.description: Package-dir glob patterns excluded from analysis.

patterns.description: A glob pattern or a list of them.

refs.description: Allow/deny entries: component names, group names, or std / external / unassigned / "*".
